abilities.description: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.
Destroy target artifact, enchantment or creature with flying.
abilities.target_prompt: Select target artifact, enchantment or creature with flying

abilities.description: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control get +2/+2 and have vigilance, trample, and indestructible."
